etymology.interpretation: The character 秋(秋) (qiū, "autumn") reflects the harvest season, associated with crops reaching maturity, and identifies the time for harvesting many vegetables. 葵(葵) (kuí, "mallow") represents okra as it belongs to the mallow family. Thus, 秋葵 (qiū kuí) describes okra as a plant that matures and is harvested around autumn, belonging to the mallow family.

examples.chinese: 秋葵(秋葵)是绿色的蔬菜(是綠色的蔬菜)。
我最喜欢炒秋葵(我最喜歡炒秋葵)。
examples.english: I like fried okra the most.

examples.chinese: 中餐时(中餐時)，我们吃了秋葵汤(我們吃了秋葵湯)。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngcān shí, wǒmen chīle qiūkuí tāng.
examples.english: During lunch, we had okra soup.
